name: Migration complete — Svelte 5
description: React→Svelte 5 migration complete Feb 2026. tsc 0 errors, svelte-check 0 errors, 4978 tests, lint 0 errors. 12 features, 15 widgets, 19 services, 37 action types. All 83 @migration stubs resolved.

name: Completed phases: Type Safety through Decomposition
description: Phase 1: Result<T,E> type, TYPE_DEBT annotations. Phase 2: StorageService (idb v8), HistoryStore<T>. Phase 3: contentStateService, ViewRouter URL sync. Phase 4: ingestTree() sequential builder. Phase 5: StatusBar, ContextualHelp. Phase 6: Coverage thresholds, smoke tests. Plus: 6 TYPE_DEBT rounds (163→25 any warnings), dead code cleanup, UI/UX audit, semantic HTML, decomposition (40+ components extracted).

name: Roadmap phases overview
description: Phase 0: structural prerequisites (ViewBus, Selection Bus, Board persistence, Search reactivity). Phase 1: interpolative fidelity (Timeline EDTF, Map+navPlace+Leaflet, Board semantics, Search parser, Viewer annotations, Metadata vocabulary). Phase 2: cross-view integration (filter propagation, Content State views, annotation pipeline, vocabulary integration). Phase 3: advanced (trajectory, semantic search, relationship graphing, multi-manifest, P2P sync). See docs/ROADMAP.md.

name: Blinker principles for LLM-driven development
description: 12 mandatory guardrails in ROADMAP.md: (1) ORIENT before code, (2) one phase item per session, (3) type-first schema-first, (4) stub check, (5) adversarial cases mandatory, (6) vault dispatch never mutate, (7) lint as prevention, (8) SYNC metrics+mulch, (9) wire end-to-end before polish, (10) shadow before shipping, (11) two-tier awareness, (12) decisions are settled.

name: Codebase inventory (Feb 2026)
description: 57 modules classified: 27 reuse, 17 refactor, 7 new, 6 mulch. Vertical view slices largely built. Horizontal connective tissue (cross-view state, selection propagation, filter composition, annotation pipeline) almost entirely absent. Two incompatible search stores. Two disconnected geo systems. Board has type duality. Pipeline store built but unwired.
